use_cases: Displaying grouped content sections with consistent styling across applications
Creating pricing cards for subscription tiers in SaaS products
Building dashboard widgets and data summary panels
Organizing form layouts with clear visual hierarchy
Displaying product or service feature highlights with headers, descriptions, and actions
ai_summary: A flexible composite Card component system from the shadcn/ui design pattern, providing Header, Title, Description, Content, and Footer sub-components for organizing grouped content with consistent shadows, borders, and typography. Designed as a foundational UI building block for displaying information in a clean, structured manner across various interfaces.
